name_cn:
Coffee Gold Hardware · 32cm
The most elegant Sac de Jour series, a timeless classic. Exquisite calfskin with a clear texture and rich luster, very luxurious! The 32cm version comes with a middle divider, can be removed to use as a clutch, and the shoulder strap is adjustable for your preferred length. The logo is very small, perfectly interpreting the style of understated luxury.
Model: 378299
Size: 32×25.5×15.5cm
(32cm comes with a middle divider)
